VAL-HIGH-005.evidence: Stop() method closes channels before wg.Wait(), race detector shows 0 races

VAL-HIGH-010.evidence: FormattingReplacerWithLanguage has nil check for user parameter with fallback values

VAL-MED-007.evidence: GetNoteAndFilterType has nil check for msg parameter with early return

VAL-MED-008.evidence: ExtractUserAndText has consolidated bounds check at function start

VAL-MED-009.evidence: extractChatFromContext has SAFETY NOTE documenting pointer return pattern

VAL-MED-010.title: Tracing span error recording
VAL-MED-010.evidence: ProcessUpdate uses named returns and defer to record error before span ends

VAL-LOW-003.title: Keyword matcher goroutine cleanup
VAL-LOW-003.evidence: Cache has Stop() method with context cancellation and stop channel

VAL-CROSS-001.title: Race detector passes
VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: go test -race ./... shows 0 races detected across all 19 packages

VAL-CROSS-002.title: All tests pass
VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: make test passes with race detection and coverage

VAL-CROSS-003.title: Lint clean
VAL-CROSS-003.note: 106 pre-existing lint issues (88 dupl + 18 staticcheck) are legacy codebase issues unrelated to utils-fixes. Structural duplication in similar functions (SetWelcomeText/SetGoodbyeText) and style suggestions are not bugs introduced by this milestone.

VAL-CROSS-004.title: No regressions
VAL-CROSS-004.evidence: All original tests pass, no functionality broken by fixes
